title: Kapil Returns
overview: Ashok, a father, envisions his 14-year-old son, Bharath, as an engineer while his wife, Meera, dreams of him becoming a doctor. The grandpa wishes for him to be a collector. However, Bharath, who is constantly engrossed in mobile games, aspires to be a cricketer. What fate awaits Bharath's dreams in the climactic turn of events?
